description: aeo-claude hooks: explore-before-create gate (PreToolUse) and ultrareview loop stop hook (Stop).

hooks.prompt:
Respond as JSON: {"ok": boolean, "reason": string|null}

Tool call: $ARGUMENTS

Respond {"ok":true} for:
- Edit tool (old_string is present) — always a modification
- Write tool where file_path is outside the cwd shown in the tool call
- Write tool creating data, docs, configs, or scripts

Respond {"ok":false,"reason":"EXPLORE-BEFORE-CREATE: Creating [describe what] without evidence that existing alternatives were checked. Search the project first, then retry."} only when ALL of these are true, because duplicate abstractions cause maintenance burden:
1. Write tool is creating a new file inside the cwd directory tree
2. The file introduces a new abstraction (class, module, config schema)
3. No similar file path or name pattern exists in the tool call context

When uncertain, respond {"ok":true}.
